title: Veil of Static
atmospheric_profile: atmospheric, mysterious, volumetric light shafts, vast orbital scale, contemplative isolation, deep space debris field with Earth crescent
quality_notes: Outstanding cinematic quality. Perfect embodiment of dark sci-fi emotional profile. Volumetric lighting, scale, and quiet mystery are premium. No artifacts, realistic suit and station details, evocative composition. Passes filter decisively.
movianx_integration_notes: Perfect for homepage hero background or large immersive rail. Strong world-building signal for sci-fi verticals.
